I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me analyze each fix:

### Fix 1 Analysis (Line 89 - Button variant type change)

The type of `Button.variant` changed to add `'stateful'` to the union. The current code uses `ButtonVariant.plain` and `ButtonVariant.secondary` — both values still exist in the new type. **No code change needed** — this is an additive change that doesn't affect existing values.

### Fix 2 Analysis (Line 49 - EmptyState family migration)

The v6 EmptyState API removes `EmptyStateHeader` and `EmptyStateIcon` as separate components. Instead:
- `headingLevel`, `titleText`, `icon`, `status` become props directly on `<EmptyState>`
- `EmptyStateBody`, `EmptyStateFooter`, `EmptyStateActions` remain as children

Current code (lines 48-53):
```jsx
<EmptyState variant={EmptyStateVariant.lg}>
  <EmptyStateHeader
    headingLevel="h4"
    icon={<EmptyStateIcon icon={StorageDomainIcon} />}
    titleText={<>{t('No storage checkups found')}</>}
  />
```

Needs to become:
```jsx
<EmptyState variant={EmptyStateVariant.lg} headingLevel="h4" icon={StorageDomainIcon} titleText={<>{t('No storage checkups found')}</>}>
```

The `icon` prop on `EmptyState` takes the icon component directly (not wrapped in `<EmptyStateIcon>`).

I also need to:
- Remove `EmptyStateHeader` and `EmptyStateIcon` from imports
- Keep `EmptyState`, `EmptyStateActions`, `EmptyStateBody`, `EmptyStateFooter`, `EmptyStateVariant`, `Button`, `ButtonVariant`

} from '@patternfly/react-core';

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `Button.variant` type change (Line 89)
**Already compatible — no change needed.** The type change is purely additive (added `'stateful'` to the union). The existing values `ButtonVariant.plain` and `ButtonVariant.secondary` remain valid in the new type. No code modification required.

### Fix 2 — EmptyState family migration (Line 49)
**Applied.** Migrated from the deprecated `EmptyStateHeader`/`EmptyStateIcon` composition to the v6 flat API:
- Moved `headingLevel="h4"`, `icon={StorageDomainIcon}`, and `titleText={...}` directly onto `<EmptyState>` as props
- Removed the `<EmptyStateHeader ... />` wrapper element
- Removed `<EmptyStateIcon>` wrapper — `icon` now takes the icon component directly (`StorageDomainIcon` instead of `<EmptyStateIcon icon={StorageDomainIcon} />`)
- Removed `EmptyStateHeader` and `EmptyStateIcon` from the `@patternfly/react-core` import statement
- Retained `EmptyStateBody`, `EmptyStateFooter`, `EmptyStateActions` as valid v6 child components

Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>
